sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numeric (id INT, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_numeric (id, value) VALUES (1, '123'), (2, '456.78'), (3, 'not_a_number'), (4, NULL);
SELECT id, value, isnumeric(value) AS is_num FROM test_numeric WHERE isnumeric(value) = 1;
SELECT id, value FROM test_numeric WHERE NOT isnumeric(value) = 0;
CREATE TABLE test_joins (id INT, num_value FLOAT, str_value VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_joins (id, num_value, str_value) VALUES (1, 1.1, 'text1'), (2, NULL, 'text2'), (3, 2.2, NULL);
SELECT j.id, j.str_value FROM test_numeric n JOIN test_joins j ON n.id = j.id WHERE NOT isnumeric(n.value) AND NOT isnumeric(j.num_value);
SELECT AVG(num_value) AS avg_num FROM test_joins GROUP BY str_value HAVING NOT isnumeric(str_value);
SELECT id, value, isnumeric(value) AS is_num FROM test_numeric ORDER BY is_num DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_not_num FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_numeric WHERE NOT isnumeric(value) = 1) AS non_numeric;
SELECT j.id, j.num_value FROM test_joins j WHERE j.num_value IS NULL OR (NOT isnumeric(j.num_value));
CREATE TABLE another_test (primary_id INT, second_value VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO another_test (primary_id, second_value) VALUES (1, '5'), (2, '10.2'), (3, 'eleven'), (4, NULL);
SELECT a.primary_id, a.second_value, isnumeric(a.second_value) AS is_num FROM another_test a WHERE NOT isnumeric(a.second_value);
SELECT PRIMARY_ID, second_value FROM another_test WHERE isnumeric(second_value) = 0;
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_numeric WHERE value IS NULL) AS has_null;
